name: Slider
description: Sliders let an operator choose a value, or a range, by dragging along a track — useful for soft, approximate settings like a geofence radius or a map's time window. When precision matters, prefer a number field.
keyRule: Use a slider when the exact number is less important than the relative position, or when immediate visual feedback helps. For exact entry (e.g. an odometer), use a text field.

variants.name: Continuous
variants.whenToUse: Any value across the range (e.g. opacity, radius).

variants.name: Discrete
variants.whenToUse: Snaps to steps with tick marks (e.g. 5/10/15 km).

variants.name: Range (two thumbs)
variants.whenToUse: Select a from–to span (e.g. a date/time window).

anatomy.name: Active track
anatomy.description: the filled portion from start to the thumb.

anatomy.name: Thumb
anatomy.description: the draggable handle at the current value.

anatomy.name: Value indicator
anatomy.description: optional bubble showing the value while dragging.

anatomy.name: Tick marks
anatomy.description: optional stops on a discrete slider.

behaviors.name: Dragging & keys
behaviors.description: Drag the thumb, click the track to jump, or use arrow keys for fine steps and Page keys for larger ones.

behaviors.name: Value feedback
behaviors.description: Show the current value (bubble or adjacent text) so the operator isn't guessing.

behaviors.name: Pairing
behaviors.description: For values that also need exact entry, pair the slider with a synced number field.

states.treatment: Primary active track + thumb; grey inactive track.

props.name: variant
props.description: Continuous = any value across the range. Discrete = snaps to steps with tick marks. Range = two thumbs (from–to).

props.name: value
props.description: Single value for continuous/discrete; [from, to] for range.

props.name: step
props.description: Step size; only meaningful for the 'discrete' variant.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called as the operator drags the thumb or uses arrow/page keys.

doThis: Use discrete steps when only certain values are valid.
Pair with a field when exact entry is needed.
dontDoThis: Don't use a slider for precise or wide-range numeric entry.
Don't make the thumb hard to grab (keep a generous hit area).
accessibility: Use a slider role with aria-valuemin/max/now (and text for ranges).
Fully keyboard operable with visible focus.
The value is announced as it changes.
